query: can you check if my checkout page is accessible? it's in src/pages/Checkout.tsx — i'm worried the gray helper text under the card fields is too low contrast and that screen readers won't announce the inputs properly

go through the ui components in src/components/ — especially the modal and the custom dropdown — and check the aria roles and whether focus is trapped correctly when the modal opens

a blind user emailed saying they can't navigate our main menu at all. can you look at Header.jsx and figure out what's making it inaccessible

this settings dashboard feels really dated and clunky, can you redesign it to look modern and premium

translate the whole site copy into Spanish and French and set up the locale switching
set up jest + react testing library and write unit tests for the form components
add a high contrast mode toggle to the app settings
the focus ring on our buttons looks ugly and generic, restyle it to use our brand purple and add a smooth transition
